recommended_action: Send Cruzr to response point and request operator acknowledgement. Safety-critical actuation should remain operator-approved or simulated.

rule_hits: two or more strong risk signs (temp >= 32.4, smoke >= 200.9, co2 >= 875.3, energy extreme (<10 or >110.7))
ai_result_ref.rationale: Temperature is above the learned monthly baseline. CO2 exceeds the learned monthly baseline. Energy consumption is unusually high compared with the monthly baseline. Smoke status indicates abnormal indoor condition. These indicate a critical indoor-environment anomaly.
